headline: Assessing Teradyne (TER) Valuation After Tokyo Electron Partnership In AI And Data Center Chip Testing
summary: Teradyne (TER) is back in focus after announcing a partnership with Tokyo Electron to deliver an integrated testing solution for AI and data center chips, putting quality control in advanced chiplet packages front and center. See our latest analysis for Teradyne. The recent collaboration with Tokyo Electron landed alongside a sharp pullback, with the share price down 5.9% on the day and 15.2% over the past week, yet still showing a 67.5% year to date share price return and a very large 1 year...

headline: Wall Street points toward gains after another AI sell-off, oil prices slip
summary: U.S. Financial markets are poised to open with strong gains Thursday following another sell-off of artificial-intelligence stocks that dragged the sector sharply lower.  Futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average gained 0.7% before the opening bell, while Nasdaq futures slipped 1%.  AI-related stocks continued to swing back-and-forth as chipmakers took back some of the losses suffered in recent days.

headline: onsemi, Teradyne, and Penguin Solutions Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI print of 4.2% annual inflation (the hottest since 2023) revived the rate hike narrative.
